quests.completion_text: There were all kinds of things inside. Likely remnants from sunken ships. In a way, I suppose you could call them keepsakes, traces of those who never made it back. Thank you for taking the time to look.

objectives.description: Interact 10 Mermaid Coffin in Ship Graveyard

quests.title: Trial of Worth
quests.greeting: Each of us has our strengths. I know how to command a ship, but I'm no fighter. That is why I’ve been searching for someone who could stand in my place, someone skilled in both battle and survival. Someone who could help me see my revenge through. Adventurer, will you show me what you’re capable of?
quests.completion_text: Thank you for accepting, even though it was no simple request. I swore I would do whatever it takes to avenge my fallen crew, no matter how difficult the path. And to do that, I need the help of someone like you. I’ll be counting on you from here on.

quests.title: Brawler of the Sea
quests.greeting: The Tidewalkers are a troublesome foe. Once they spot an enemy, they attack without hesitation, no matter the circumstance. They're especially aggressive when accompanied by one of their shamans, so caution is advised. A scouting party I sent out recently has run into serious trouble because of them. I could use your help. Subdue them, if you can.
quests.completion_text: Well done. Thanks to you, our scouting efforts should go more smoothly for a while. All I can do now is hope they find my brother’s map. It was taken when he was captured by the pirates, so it must be somewhere in the Ship Graveyard.

objectives.description: Kill 7 Tidewalker Clubfighter in Ship Graveyard
Kill 7 Tidewalker Slinger in Ship Graveyard
Kill 3 Tidewalker Spearer in Ship Graveyard

quests.title: Pieces of a Broken Dream
quests.greeting: During the last search, we were fortunate enough to recover a portion of the map I’ve been looking for. But it isn’t enough. We need the remaining pieces. With both the monsters and the pirates still prowling that place, continuing the search is proving too difficult. Adventurer, would you help me recover the rest of the map? I’m asking for your help.
quests.completion_text: This map is a keepsake filled with my brother’s passion. He was an archaeologist, and together we searched for signs of ancient ruins and forgotten sea routes. We once promised to set sail and explore them, should we ever find a promising lead. I intend to carry on that dream, even if I must do it alone. This map will be the beginning.

quests.title: Where the Map Points
quests.greeting: Adventurer, I have a favor to ask. While examining my brother’s map, I found a marked location deeper within the Ship Graveyard. It’s labeled for investigation, though I don’t know what he hoped to find there. Could you look into it for me? If anything stands out, please let me know.
quests.completion_text: A fortress-like structure, you say? Then it must have been built by human hands. How intriguing. If my brother were still alive, he would have been thrilled by such a discovery. I'm only a navigator, so I can't say much more, but even I can tell this is something worth studying. I’ll try to find an archaeologist who might be interested. For my brother’s sake.

objectives.description: Explore ShipGraveyard PiratePrison in Ship Graveyard

chapters.name: In Search of the Echoes of the Past

quests.title: An Unforgotten Memory
quests.greeting: When my ship was taken by pirates... I was lucky to survive, but the others weren’t. Most were thrown into the sea, and that was the last I saw of them. The waters near the Blue Maelstrom are full of man-eating fish. Adventurer, please deal with them. And if you find any items that might have belonged to sailors, bring them to me. I want to know if they were people I once knew.
quests.completion_text: This... this is my crewmate’s journal. He was fond of keeping records, always curious, always jotting down everything he learned. I never thought I’d see this again. Thank you, adventurer. Truly.

objectives.description: Kill 10 Sea Piranha in Ship Graveyard

quests.title: A Wish Etched in Ink
quests.greeting: While reading through my crewmate’s journal, I found something interesting. It speaks of glowing pearls and unusually shaped coral near the Blue Maelstrom. It seems he truly wished to see them with his own eyes. Adventurer, would you help me find them? I’d like to fulfill his wish, even if it’s a little late.
quests.completion_text: The pearl truly holds a glow within it. And the coral... it's thicker, with a strange texture unlike any I’ve seen. I only wish he could have seen them himself. I’ll deliver these to his family, along with the journal he left behind.

quests.title: The Path Beyond the Map
quests.greeting: My brother’s research notes speak of a great river that once existed and a guardian said to dwell within it. Most of it is speculation, but the description of the guardian is hard to ignore. A beast with massive jaws, a vertical eye, and thick, leathery skin... It might be connected to the Crocodilian. Hunt them down and bring me one of their eyes. There’s something I need to confirm.
quests.completion_text: My ancient compass points to places connected to the item placed upon it. If we set the Crocodilian eye here, it should respond... Hmm. It’s pointing to a land abandoned long ago. I’ve heard the river there dried up, the earth turned foul, and nothing lives there now. This warrants investigation.

quests.title: The Pirate's Refuge
quests.greeting: We’ve scouted much of the Ship Graveyard, but the area where the pirates gather is beyond what our search parties can handle. Adventurer, I need you to investigate the places they frequent. We must know what kind of weapons they’re hiding and whether they’re preparing for something. They’re not to be underestimated, so be careful.
quests.completion_text: Thank you for checking. It seems their weapons aren’t in as good a condition as I feared, and they don’t appear to be hiding much either. What I need now is someone with the skill to surpass them. Someone like you, adventurer.

objectives.description: Explore ShipGraveyard CircleIsland in Ship Graveyard
Explore ShipGraveyard FloatingVillage in Ship Graveyard
Explore ShipGraveyard HangingShip in Ship Graveyard
Explore ShipGraveyard RockIsland in Ship Graveyard

quests.title: The Price of Loyalty
quests.greeting: The Black Despair pirates are blindly loyal to their captain. They’ve long claimed dominion over these seas, plundering and burning countless ships. Now it’s time they were repaid in kind.
quests.completion_text: Well done. They seemed unstoppable, and yet... here we are. Victory, at last. Now, only one step remains. Adventurer, I need your strength one final time.

objectives.description: Kill 10 Pirate Axe Thrower in Ship Graveyard
Kill 20 Pirate Bowman in Ship Graveyard
Kill 20 Pirate Swordman in Ship Graveyard

quests.title: Despair’s End
quests.greeting: There isn’t a sailor alive who hasn’t heard of Captain Bladehand. That wretched pirate has long been a scar buried deep within me. Ever since the day I survived his attack, I’ve waited for the chance to take revenge. Now, everything is in place. Adventurer, I ask you to end him.
quests.completion_text: It’s truly over. I hope this means my fallen crewmates can finally rest in peace. And as for me... perhaps it’s time I started living for myself. Thank you, truly.

objectives.description: Kill 5 Frost Skeleton Archer in Ice Cavern
Kill 5 Frost Wolf in Ice Cavern
Kill 5 Ice Harpy in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Awoken Without a Name
quests.greeting: I remember not who I am... what deeds I once performed... nor even the reason for my death... There is but one thing I recall... that I am searching for something... That yearning alone stirred me from my slumber... Perhaps, if the coffins within the catacombs were opened... some trace may yet remain... Adventurer... would you help me recover the memories I have lost...?
quests.completion_text: There were no clear signs, I see... but it matters not... While I waited for your return... a memory came to me... I was there, in that castle... I remember writing something... and watching someone die... so many... so many deaths...

quests.title: Where the Dead Whisper
quests.greeting: Adventurer... I ask thee to journey to the place where others like me have begun to stir... Seek out any among them who, like myself, may have recovered fragments of their memory... If such a one exists, you may be able to speak with them... and perhaps then I shall learn what it is I am truly seeking...
quests.completion_text: You say they were all mindless monsters... No... they were not monsters... They too were once living people... What led them to death... was magic... my magic... our magic... Ah... I have sinned...!

objectives.description: Explore Ruins Chapel in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: What I Truly Desired
quests.greeting: ...What is it that I so desperately longed for... Was it treasure... or jewels... such things as these... Could it be that mere filthy greed... was what led so many to their deaths by my hand... Gods, let it not be so... Adventurer... bring me the gems... If I see them with my own eyes, perhaps I shall know the truth...
quests.completion_text: No... it wasn’t that... What I seek is not treasure... It was... yes, something terrible... something written down... Ah... my head... it feels as if it will shatter... This pain, it’s too much... I cannot think... Please... make it stop... make it stop...

quests.title: The Scroll That Should Not Be
quests.greeting: At last, I remember... What I seek is a scroll... one that holds knowledge most dangerous... It was used to draw out the essence of darkness... using people... leading them, in the end, to death... That scroll is unlike any other... it has not faded, nor has it decayed... and it still lies somewhere within the castle... Adventurer, I beg you... please, find it for me...
quests.completion_text: Yes... this is it... At last, all has returned to me... Adventurer, I was a sorcerer of the castle... The experiments were ordered by the court mage... I believed it was a work to preserve life... but the truth was far darker... When I learned what it truly was, I tried to destroy the scroll... but I failed... and I too became one of the subjects... Now that I have it again, I can finally put it to rest... and perhaps, at last, find peace... Thank you, adventurer...

quests.title: Bone and Blood
quests.greeting: Greetings, adventurer. I’ve got a bone to pick with you. Your constant skirmishes have left some of my companions somewhat disassembled. After enduring a year of relentless battles, I'm taking a well-deserved break and seeking a capable adventurer like you to aid us.
quests.completion_text: While we're on the subject of bones, I've amusedly listened to countless theories about our bleeding—from magical explanations to scientific fantasies. But between us? I suspect the powers that control our world simply find it visually appealing, delightfully grim.

quests.title: Graveyard Shifts
quests.greeting: Ever wonder what a skeleton's day job is like? Try surviving these places. It's not all rattling bones and eerie moans. Try surviving where we reign; it might just chill your marrow.
quests.completion_text: You've survived! That’s more than most of my acquaintances can say.

quests.title: Etched in Bone
quests.greeting: Lately, I've heard whispers that my comrades are falling far too easily. As proud skeletons, we must show we're not just hollow-boned fools. Bring me their skulls. As many as you can. I'll make sure the lesson sticks.
quests.completion_text: Good! Very good. Our skeletons will come back stronger, after some properly bone-deep training. And it's all thanks to you. If anything else comes up, we'll handle it next year. For now, let's enjoy the celebration.

quests.title: The Squire’s Request
quests.greeting: Hello, adventurer. Um... could I ask you for a small favor? I'm helping out adventurers here for now, but it's always been my dream to go on a real adventure myself someday. My uncle, the Tavern Master, keeps saying it's too soon and won't let me go. But I just know I could do well, if I had some decent gear. If you could find me a few pieces... would you, maybe? Please?
quests.completion_text: Thank you so much! The truth is... I'm an orphan. If my uncle hadn't taken me in, I don't know where I'd be now. I'm truly grateful for everything he's done, I really am. But... sometimes I think he's a bit overprotective. Still, I suppose it's up to me to prove myself first. If I can do that, then even he won't be able to say no.

quests.title: The Squire’s Curiosity
quests.greeting: I know it's just a Ruins now, but it used to be a grand castle, didn't it? It's become a lair for monsters these days... but I've heard that many of the old statues are still standing, hidden throughout the place. I was wondering... could you look for them in my stead? I'm not quite ready to go there myself, not yet. Please... would you do that for me?
quests.completion_text: Oh no... So most of the statues are broken? That's really sad to hear. Just imagining them shattered like that... it makes my heart ache a little. I wish we could bring some of the pieces back. But I suppose that would be difficult, wouldn't it? They're probably far too heavy... What a shame.

objectives.description: Explore Ruins TowerBridge Destroyed in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: The Squire’s Compassion
quests.greeting: They say the Forgotten Castle is haunted by skeletons that walk on their own. What kind of terrible curse could force them to rise, even in death, never knowing rest? Whenever I talk like this, people tell me not to dwell on such things... but I can't help it. I think it's all so very sad. Please, adventurer, help those poor souls find peace.
quests.completion_text: I've never met someone as kind as you, adventurer. Especially someone who actually listens to what I say, instead of just brushing it off. I'll do my best from now on to be of real help to you, too!

objectives.description: Kill 3 Skeleton Archer in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 3 Skeleton Footman in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 3 Skeleton Guardman in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: The Squire’s Failure
quests.greeting: I went to the Forgotten Castle on my own not long ago... but I barely made it past the entrance before some beast started chasing me. I ran for my life and somehow got away, but I lost my weapon and my armor’s all torn to bits. Becoming an adventurer... it’s not quite how I imagined. I’d go back and try again, but I don’t have anything to wear or wield anymore. Adventurer, could you help me find new gear? Something a little better this time... please?
quests.completion_text: Thank you so much! I think I may have taken it all too lightly. I really believed I could handle it on my own... but now I see I wasn't ready. Next time, I’m going to try finding a companion or two. If we go together, maybe we’ll make it farther than just the entrance.

quests.title: The Squire’s Daydream
quests.greeting: Adventurer, have you ever been to Frost Mountain? Just imagining a place where it's always winter feels like something out of a dream. Especially the ice caves. I'm sure they're filled with crystal-clear ice, glittering like gemstones. And the ceiling must be lined with huge icicles, hanging down like frozen spears. It must be such a breathtaking sight! If you ever go there, would you tell me what it was like? If anything stands out, something truly magical, please promise you'll share it with me!
quests.completion_text: Wow, the ceiling's really that high? I can hardly imagine it! And if there's even a bridge inside... it must be huge! The whole floor made of ice too? I’d probably slip the moment I stepped in. Still... I’ve made up my mind! My next adventure will be to Frost Mountain! I want to see it all with my own eyes!

objectives.description: Explore IceCave Guardpost in Ice Cavern
Explore IceCave Altar in Ice Cavern

quests.title: The Squire’s Reality
quests.greeting: Adventurer... the skeletons were nothing like I imagined. I thought I would feel sorry for them, but I didn’t. They were terrifying. I only saw them from afar, but I was so scared I couldn’t even move. And the ones in Frost Mountain were even worse. Their bones were all frozen blue, like they had been trapped in ice for ages. It was awful. Please, adventurer, can you take care of them? I don’t think I’ll be able to sleep until they're gone.
quests.completion_text: I’m so sick of skeletons now. I don’t ever want to see those creaky, clattering things again... Thank you, adventurer. I think I can finally get a good night’s sleep with both eyes closed. From now on, you can leave all your preparations to me. I’ll make sure everything is packed just right, extra carefully, just for you!

objectives.description: Kill 7 Frost Skeleton Archer in Ice Cavern
Kill 7 Frost Skeleton Footman in Ice Cavern
Kill 7 Frost Skeleton Guardman in Ice Cavern

quests.title: The Squire’s Sorrow
quests.greeting: The Frost Mountain adventure was a complete disaster. I barely made it out alive, and only thanks to the companions who were with me. I lost all my gear too... the ones you worked so hard to find for me. I'm such a fool... You don’t have to say anything to comfort me. My uncle was right. Maybe someone like me just isn’t meant to be an adventurer... What? You want to help me get new equipment again? No, please, don’t trouble yourself because of me. Adventurer? Adventurer, wait!
quests.completion_text: Such a wonderful gift... There is no one else like you in the whole world, adventurer. Thank you, truly, thank you. I promise, this time I will not break it or lose it. I will treasure it with all my heart, I swear. And I will not give up until I become a real adventurer.

quests.title: The Squire’s Hesitation
quests.greeting: This time, I don't want to be a burden to anyone, so I'm looking for a place I can explore on my own. I heard the Goblin Caves aren't too difficult for a beginner adventurer. What do you think? Still, the thought of going alone is a bit scary... If you don’t mind, could you check the caves out first? Just to see if there are any safe spots or places to hide, even just a little. Hehe... thank you.
quests.completion_text: Hearing your words makes me feel a little more at ease. I’ll be careful and stick to the places you mentioned. I promise! So, wish me luck, alright?

objectives.description: Explore Cave PitHall in Goblin Cave
Explore Cave Tomb in Goblin Cave

quests.title: For the Squire
quests.greeting: Well... I did make it as far as the cave entrance, but... there were a lot more goblins than I expected. With that many, I don't think I could handle even one on my own. And if they surround me, I’d be in real trouble. Adventurer, would you be willing to take care of some of the goblins for me? I think I’d find the courage to try again if I knew it was a little safer.
quests.completion_text: I’ll never forget your kindness. I won’t give up until I truly become an adventurer, no matter what. And I’ll keep doing my best to help the other adventurers too. Especially you. I’ll make sure everything is prepared with extra care, just for you. Thank you so much!

objectives.description: Kill 15 Goblin Archer in Goblin Cave
Kill 15 Goblin Axeman in Goblin Cave
Kill 15 Goblin Warrior in Goblin Cave

quests.title: Marks of Malice
quests.greeting: I’ve had an influx of patients recently—so I need more supplies, stat. Many of them have those marks, carved deep into their skin. Some of the cuts are precise, almost surgical, while others look like they were made by a less experienced hand. There’s something about these wounds that’s disturbing.
quests.completion_text: While you were gone, I confirmed my hypothesis. They’re not healing like they should, and I can’t help but wonder if whatever was used to make those cuts was coated in some kind of poison. I need to look into something, and I’ll need your help soon, so hurry back.

quests.title: In the Name of Progress
quests.greeting: I am a physician, but there are things in this world that cannot be treated with a scalpel. Curses, souls, and other abnormalities. Such entities exist even within the Ruins. They do not behave like anything that truly lives. I cannot heal them, but I can study them.
quests.completion_text: As I have grown older, my knowledge has increased, yet there is still much left to learn in this world. The entities found in the Ruins are among them. It is time for a more thorough examination of things whose nature remains unknown.

objectives.description: Kill 5 Living Armor in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Whispers of the Past
quests.greeting: I’ve been investigating the Spectral Knight’s chambers, and I’ve found signs of recent activity. Something happened there recently, and I need you to search for traces of a ritual. It’s vital we uncover what was done, as it could give us a clearer understanding of what we’re up against.
quests.completion_text: What you found in those chambers paints a clearer picture, but there’s still much to unravel. The ritual is tied to the curse, and we’re getting closer to understanding its source.

objectives.description: Explore Ruins Keep in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Doctor's Orders
quests.greeting: Oh dear, it looks like our medical supplies are running dangerously low. You’ll be able to retrieve more from the crates hidden in the Forgotten Castle.
quests.completion_text: Great job! Just what the doctor ordered!

quests.title: Undead Eradication
quests.greeting: I must admit my curiosity for knowledge gets the best of me at times. I’m interested with the inner workings of a couple particular creatures in the castle. Your assistance in this matter would be greatly appreciated.
quests.completion_text: Simply incredible. Not in a millennia would I have ever guessed this to be the case. Do not disclose my actions to my brother as he despises my methods. Take these for your vow of silence.

objectives.description: Kill 5 Giant Dragonfly in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Prepared For The Unexpected
quests.greeting: Surgery is a delicate art that requires the proper tools. Although my current supplies are adequate I would be more comfortable with a few more at hand.
quests.completion_text: That will do the job. Precision and reliability are important in my field of work. It’s a shame my brother doesn’t hold the same standards.

objectives.description: Use 3 Surgical Kit in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Frost Aid
quests.greeting: Suffering an unattended injury in the unforgiving chill of the mountains can be a death call. I can explain the process but I recommend first hand practice with proper first aid to improve your survival odds. Only utilize a potion if worse comes to worse.
quests.completion_text: I hate to admit it but my brother’s concoctions may have some use after all. Still, I stand by methods as the most effective.

objectives.description: Use 3 Healing Potion in Ice Cavern
Use 1 Surgical Kit in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Sanctified Healing
quests.greeting: Even as a man of science, I must admit that the power of the divine have their role. I am however curious as to the limits of the gods. I have a simple experiment I’d like you to undertake for me.
quests.completion_text: I must admit I was a little mistaken. It seems that the gods are more powerful than I initially thought.

quests.title: Precise as Ice
quests.greeting: I have an odd request of you. I’m very interested in the anatomy of our giant cousins. If you could bring me a few of their toes for research, I’d be extremely grateful.
quests.completion_text: I much appreciate your intrepidness. Your deeds are making valuable contributions to the advancements of knowledge.

quests.title: Critical Care
quests.greeting: I’ve discovered a powerful use for maggots and mold to help heal the body. If you don’t believe me here is what you need to do.
quests.completion_text: Amazing isn’t it? There must be some antiseptic properties I should investigate.

objectives.description: Use 1 Surgical Kit in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Purging Darkness
quests.greeting: I fear that the forces of darkness grow ever stronger. You must be our beacon of hope and if you should ever be injured in battle, remember what I have taught you.
quests.completion_text: Well done, my friend! I am happy to see that my teachings were able to keep you in one piece.

objectives.description: Kill 10 Death Skull in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 6 Living Statue in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Stone And Bones
quests.greeting: Alas, I have a final task to ask of you. There’s a door, marked by stone or bones. Beyond this door is an ancient evil who must be vanquished.
quests.completion_text: Amazing job! Keep exploring, keep learning, and who knows what other secrets you might uncover.

quests.title: Verification of Medical Supplies
quests.greeting: More and more people are using the medical supplies found in the dungeon. I warned them not to use unverified items, but no one seems to listen. Do you think the same way they do? ...Adventurers, honestly. If that’s the case, then at the very least, I want to ensure their safety. Please help me by testing as many of these dungeon-sourced medical supplies as possible and reporting the results.
quests.completion_text: How was it? Did your condition worsen in any way? Or were there any side effects...? Are you saying it was truly fine? Even though the most basic hygiene must have been lacking, it still worked? ...If it’s effective, I suppose I can’t stop people from using it. Though I still hope they reconsider. In any case, thank you for letting me know.

objectives.description: Use 10 Surgical Kit in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Whose Scream Is It?
quests.greeting: Strange rumors have been spreading recently. They say screams can be heard throughout the Forgotten Castle. Of course, that place has never been silent—I know that well. However... they claim these are the screams of a woman. Yet, there were no female adventurers present. Could you verify whether this is merely a rumor or something real?
quests.completion_text: Are you saying you heard nothing at all? ...I see. Very well. I asked you to investigate just in case, but perhaps finding nothing is actually for the best. At the very least, I hope the leathersmith never hears of these rumors. I don’t wish to see that look of disappointment on his face again.

quests.title: The Worth of the Dungeon
quests.greeting: I am considering ways to repurpose the fabrics recovered from the dungeon. Since many adventurers are already using dungeon-sourced medical supplies without hesitation, I wonder if other materials could also be of use. If I find something suitable, it could help compensate for the shortage of resources. I would appreciate it if you could gather as many different types of fabric as possible.
quests.completion_text: Thanks to you, I’ll have enough materials to experiment with for a while. I only hope that at least one of these fabrics proves useful as a resource. First, I’ll need to boil them thoroughly to cleanse them.

quests.title: Tar and Textile
quests.greeting: I heard the news. So it's finally possible to reach the Blue Maelstrom, is it? Perfect timing, really. I've been in need of new materials. Sailors, I’m told, coat cloth with tar to make it waterproof. Could you bring me a sail and some tar? The condition of the sail doesn’t matter. I simply want to examine the texture myself. I’m counting on you.
quests.completion_text: Hmm, this fabric is thick and coarse. It wouldn’t be suitable for proper clothing as it is. I’d need a heavy needle and thick thread just to sew it. Still, the fact that it’s waterproof is quite appealing. I’ll need to give some thought to how I can make use of this tar.

objectives.description: Kill 5 Skeleton Archer in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 5 Skeleton Swordman in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: What Has Been Worn Away
quests.greeting: Lately, I have been repairing more garments than making new ones, especially those worn by adventurers returning from their journeys. If they are damaged to this extent, the cause cannot be ordinary. If you are willing, could you look into it for me? Should you encounter anything dangerous, please take care and bring back anything that might serve as a clue.
quests.completion_text: So it was those things that are neither dead nor alive. Where do these cursed creatures even come from? I have also heard of people returning from their expeditions in a rather peculiar state. I cannot help but wonder if there is a connection. This is something I must look into.

quests.title: Luminous Cloth
quests.greeting: I’ve heard rumors of jellyfish in the Blue Maelstrom that give off their own light. They say you can extract a glowing fluid from them if you manage to kill one. Could you get some for me? If I can use that fluid to create luminous fabric, I’ll have the attention and admiration of the upper class in no time!
quests.completion_text: This liquid is truly fascinating. It gives off a soft glow during the day and shines even brighter at night. Even the way it feels on my fingertips is something special. I’ll probably lose sleep for days just thinking about how and where to use it. Thank you so much!

objectives.description: Explore Inferno DeathPlatforms in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Beasts of Burden
quests.greeting: I’ve worked with fabric all my life, weaving threads into something stronger. But now? Now the threads of this land are fraying, unraveling. These creatures, this cursed wilderness—there’s something far darker at play here, and it’s not just about survival. It’s about control. They’re being manipulated. If we can cut down the monsters and uncover what they’re hiding, we might be able to stop the unraveling.
quests.completion_text: Good work, but you look like you’ve had your share of the wilds. This curse—it’s not just an accident of nature. There’s something behind it, something that keeps tightening the noose around us.

objectives.description: Kill 3 Dire Wolf in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 1 Ruins Golem in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Tailored Wellness
quests.greeting: Look at you, not quite as tattered as when you first came in, but still showing signs of wear. Don’t ignore it—those ruins don’t just take their toll on your body, they gnaw at your spirit, too. The Shrines of Health should do the trick for now, but you’ve got to keep yourself in one piece if you want to keep moving forward.
quests.completion_text: Better, much better. You’re not quite the mess you were, but we’re far from done. Now, back to the task at hand. I need to have a word with someone. Meet me here later when you’re ready to continue.

quests.title: In Shambles
quests.greeting: Seeing you in this state takes me back to my own beginnings—digging through trash for scraps, with nothing to my name but hunger and desperation. Let’s gather what’s needed, and I’ll help you craft something that leads to a better tomorrow.
quests.completion_text: Ah, with these materials, I can work wonders. Let me weave my magic. There, now you look like someone I wouldn't mind being seen with.

quests.title: Cold Shoulder
quests.greeting: Frost Mountain offers more than just cold winds and icy peaks. It holds the promise of timeless beauty, its wintry embrace offering a chance to defy the ravages of time.
quests.completion_text: The bitter cold of Frost Mountain invokes memories of a time when my survival seemed uncertain. Yet here I stand, fabulous as ever! Now, onto matters of utmost importance - securing my status at the upcoming elite soirée. Be on your way so I can focus on what I am going to wear.

quests.title: Murmurs Among The Aristocracy
quests.greeting: Amidst the opulent festivities of high society, I caught wind of troubling news. The rumors of some strange monstrous beasts roaming these lands. You know how most nobility are, don't you? They'll vanish to their countryside estates if we don't address this threat swiftly.
quests.completion_text: Exemplary as always! I've worked hard to reach where I am, and I refuse to rely on any more handouts from my adopted family. So, lend your strength to make these lands safer, ensuring the wealthy continue investing here.

quests.title: Infiltrating With Accessories
quests.greeting: We have an intriguing assignment today. You will be procuring materials so I can craft accessories as part of a covert operation, designed to deceive one of the dark lords. By gaining their favor, we aim to secure access and gather information.
quests.completion_text: Kudos acquiring the materials. You won't be the one making the offering, for they will know you are an imposter. I have someone in mind whom I will disguise as a potential Dark Follower to carry out this delicate task.

quests.title: An Uncomfortable Request
quests.greeting: To win the favor of the upper class, one must know plenty of entertaining stories. Young lords, in particular, are especially fond of tales of adventure. One such curious young master has made a rather troublesome request—he wants someone to slay the monsters of Frost Mountain on his behalf and then recount the adventure to him. What do you think? Are you interested? At the very least, the reward will be generous.
quests.completion_text: Alright. I’ll make sure to deliver your brave tale—embellished just enough to suit the young lord’s taste. What is routine for us is nothing more than a fantastical story for them.

objectives.description: Kill 3 Frozen Ghost in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Tales of the Frost Mountain Expedition
quests.greeting: Hmm, it seems your tale was well received. This time, the young lord wants to hear about the fascinating locations in Frost Mountain. There’s only so much I can make up on my own, you know. Since we’ve already started this, why don’t you help me out? Explore Frost Mountain thoroughly and find places that are grand, beautiful, or unique enough to make for a good story.
quests.completion_text: Oh, there are a few things worth using. With a bit of embellishment, they should make for a fine tale. Thank you. But... I couldn’t help but notice, just like last time—you’re not exactly gifted at storytelling.

objectives.description: Kill 3 Frost Demon in Ice Cavern
Kill 5 Ice Hound in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Fantasy and Reality
quests.greeting: There’s a problem. The young lord enjoyed our stories too much—so much that he now insists on becoming an adventurer! His mother, the lady of the house, is furious! If this keeps up, my connections will be ruined! No, that cannot happen. It’s time to show this naïve young lord a taste of reality.
quests.completion_text: Alright, this is graphic enough—disgustingly so. Now, let’s string it together and wrap it up nicely... Oh, don’t worry too much. I’ll only show just enough. Hopefully, this will make the young lord abandon his foolish dream.

prerequisite.title: Tales of the Frost Mountain Expedition

chapters.name: The Child Who Dreams of Adventure

quests.title: The Cave of Inspiration
quests.greeting: Frost Mountain truly boasts a breathtaking view. I visited once, long ago, and the Ice Caverns in particular... such mystique, such atmosphere. It stirs the creative fire in artists like myself. Hmm, do you happen to know how to draw? If so, be a dear and sketch the caverns for me, will you? I have a feeling they'll spark some marvelous ideas for my next line.
quests.completion_text: Well, you may not be much of a talker, but your sketches are surprisingly decent. Thank you. They’ll be quite helpful for my next design.

objectives.description: Kill 15 Frost Skeleton Archer in Ice Cavern
Kill 10 Frost Skeleton Axeman in Ice Cavern
Kill 5 Frost Skeleton Crossbowman in Ice Cavern
Kill 15 Frost Skeleton Footman in Ice Cavern
Kill 15 Frost Skeleton Guardman in Ice Cavern
Kill 10 Frost Skeleton Halberdier in Ice Cavern
Kill 10 Frost Skeleton Maceman in Ice Cavern

quests.title: The Stylish One’s Survival Strategy
quests.greeting: Looking at your sketches has only confirmed it for me, I simply must see it with my own eyes. But as much as my stitching is impeccable, I must admit, combat isn't exactly my forte. I know it's dangerous, and I’m not foolish enough to charge in unprepared. So how about this, you go on ahead and deal with the monsters for me. I promise the reward will be well worth your while.
quests.completion_text: Thank you. Your talents truly shine brightest as an adventurer. Thanks to you, Frost Mountain should be safe for a while. I’ll be able to visit with peace of mind now.

quests.title: How to Use a Wendigo
quests.greeting: When I visited Frost Mountain, I caught sight of a wendigo in the distance. I used to think all monsters were just hideous brutes, but the wendigo... there’s something different about it. Striking. That peculiar form of its... it might even inspire some patterns or embellishments for a new outfit. Of course, I can’t very well ask you to bring one back alive, so just collect whatever parts you can find. I’ll decide later whether they’re worth using.
quests.completion_text: Oh, you really did bring everything you could, didn’t you... First of all, these entrails, the stench is absolutely unbearable. I need to get rid of them before the smell clings to my fabrics. Now, the rest... intriguing, really. The horns have a magnificent curve to them. And this heart, how extraordinary. Cold as carved ice, yet still faintly pulsing. I like it. Get ready. I’m going to create something the world has never seen.

objectives.description: Kill 8 Frost Demon in Ice Cavern
Kill 12 Frost Sentinel in Ice Cavern
Kill 15 Ice Hound in Ice Cavern

quests.title: A Simple Test
quests.greeting: Welcome. If you are looking for information or companions, you have come to the right place. This is where adventurers and rumors tend to gather. But information often comes with danger. I do not give work to just anyone. If you want a contract, show me what you can do.
quests.completion_text: Well done. You can tell at a glance whether someone is a prepared adventurer or just pretending by how they deal with the undead. You are the real thing.

quests.title: Worth Taking
quests.greeting: There are more useful items in a dungeon than you might expect, including things you can obtain without having to fight every monster. If I were to offer one piece of advice, do not pass by the small chests in the old castle. Take a closer look, and you may find something better than you expected.
quests.completion_text: I hope you found something worthwhile. Those who come back with decent loot usually return here for an ale. If you have a little coin to spare, why not have a drink yourself.

quests.title: What Matters Most
quests.greeting: As you know, the old castle is a dangerous place. With a bit of luck, you might find valuable gear or coin. But none of it matters unless you make it back alive. Adventurer, explore the Forgotten Castle and return safely.
quests.completion_text: You made it back without injury. That is good to see. With this level of skill, I can trust you with proper contracts from here on.

quests.title: Is it you?
quests.greeting: Once, those skeletons were men—brave warriors, sworn to protect this kingdom. But the king’s lust for dark power twisted them, and they became pawns in a game much larger than themselves. Their souls were bound by a curse that would not let them rest. There’s a prophecy, though—one that speaks of a ‘chosen one,’ someone who will break the curse and put these souls to rest. I thought I might be that one once. I had the strength, the will... but something happened—something I’ll never speak of. It shattered that belief. This chosen one, though... they were meant to end the curse, to give peace to the restless dead. I’m not saying it’s you, but... what’s the harm in trying?
quests.completion_text: When you put them down, did you feel it? A shift in the air, like something heavy finally lifted? I’ve got a hunch about it. You should pay a visit to the Fortune Teller—tell her I sent you. She might have more insight into what’s really going on here. I’ll be heading to see her myself soon enough... I’ve got a feeling in my gut, and it’s not the ale.

objectives.description: Kill 5 Skeleton Archer in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 5 Skeleton Footman in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 5 Skeleton Guardman in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: A Strange Freshness
quests.greeting: That old castle should hold nothing but rot, yet food and drink still turn up there. Fresh fruit, even meals that are still warm, are not something to brush aside. If you find anything like that in the castle, bring it to me. And whatever you do, do not try eating it yourself.
quests.completion_text: I’ve taken a look at what you brought back, and there doesn’t seem to be anything wrong with it. It smells fine, and it even seems fit to eat. All the more strange. What kind of magic could be at work in that cursed castle...

quests.title: Paper and Ink
quests.greeting: I seem to have misplaced something important, something more than just paper and ink... a map, to be exact. It once led me to places I preferred to forget, but now I need it. The forgotten castle might still hold the answers, or perhaps more nightmares. Think you can find it in that cursed place?
quests.completion_text: This map... it’s got history. Every mark on it tells of a time before everything fell apart. Maybe one day, I’ll tell you all about it over a drink... or perhaps over something stronger. But for now, the map is yours.

objectives.description: Explore Ruins GreatHall 03 Destroyed in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: The First Trial
quests.greeting: Ah, you’ve returned. I paid a visit to our friend, but we’ll need a few things before we can move forward. It’s the first of many trials, if you can call them that. Gather what’s needed, and we’ll see where this leads. If you succeed, we’ll talk about the next step—but let’s not get ahead of ourselves, eh? One thing at a time.
quests.completion_text: You’ve done well, but don’t relax just yet. There’s a long road ahead, and the challenges will only grow harder. The tavern’s packed at the moment—swing by later when things settle.

quests.title: Bloody Fingers
quests.greeting: I’ve got another task for you, and it won’t be pretty. The mages—they’ll tear through your defenses if you’re not careful. As for the champion... well, if you make it back, you’ll understand why they call it that. Take them down, and we’ll have one less obstacle standing between us and the truth. Keep your head on straight—this one's going to test your patience.
quests.completion_text: Well done. Those mages won’t be casting their spells again, and the champion’s fallen, as expected. But don’t let your guard down just yet. Had a strange visitor the other night—he was covered in blood and wore a necklace with freshly cut, bloody fingers. When he saw me looking, he quickly covered himself with his cloak, ate, and left. We’ll talk more later; never know who’s listening.

objectives.description: Kill 2 Skeleton Champion in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 3 Skeleton Mage in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Wenchless
quests.greeting: Good to see you back in one piece. Things are a mess around here—my wenches have all come down with something, and I’m starting to think it’s not just the roasted rabbit from the other night. In times like this, it’s always smart to have a backup plan. You never know when you’ll need a quick exit.
quests.completion_text: Good to see you back. The wenches? Still laid up with something, and I’m starting to think it’s more than just food poisoning. Things have quieted down for now, so I’m thinking of paying the Surgeon another visit. Hopefully, he’s got something that’ll get them back on their feet—customers are a lot more satisfied when there are busty women to serve them.

quests.title: Icy Bastards
quests.greeting: Word around the tavern is that some frost-bitten creatures have been roaming the outskirts, freezing everything in their path. I’ve got an old friend who might know a way to deal with them, but he needs some muscle first. If you’re willing to brave the cold, I’ll see you’re compensated properly. Just don’t let those icy bastards catch you off guard.
quests.completion_text: I’ll make sure word gets around that you’re not someone to be trifled with. Come by for a drink sometime, you’ve earned more than just the coin.

objectives.description: Kill 5 Frost Walker in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Frosty Escapes
quests.greeting: Now that you've got some experience under your belt, I’ve got a task that’ll put your skills to the test. We need to check the escape routes—make sure they're clear and ready in case things go south. It's cold out there, though, so make sure you bundle up. Last thing I need is for you to catch a chill... or worse.
quests.completion_text: Back already? You look frozen solid! Go thaw out by the fire while I fetch you something to warm you up from the inside—my own recipe.

quests.title: A Giant Problem
quests.greeting: Ready to face some real danger? We’ve got frost-covered fiends lurking in the shadows of Frost Mountain. A search party’s heading up to look for that missing girl, and they could use some backup. I need you to help clear the way, make sure they’re not walking into a death trap.
quests.completion_text: The search party should be in safer hands now. Come on back and take a seat. I’ve got some hearty stew waiting for you—warm you up after all that cold. You’ve earned it.

objectives.description: Kill 3 Frost Giant Berserker in Ice Cavern
Kill 3 Frost Giant Shielder in Ice Cavern

quests.title: The Unraveling
quests.greeting: Things have been shifting in the shadows lately, and I’m not the only one who’s noticed. More and more of the merchants have been pooling their resources, exchanging whispers in hushed corners, trying to make sense of what’s happening. The tavern—once brimming with chatter and laughter—is quieter now. It’s as if the life here is slowly being drained away. Even my wenches, bless them, have fallen ill with a strange sickness, one I can’t explain. Some say the darkness is coming from the Forgotten Castle. And if we don’t do something now, it will be too late. The brothers have suggested we investigate the undead filth lurking there, to see if we can learn how to break this curse before it spreads any further, before we harm the ones we love.
quests.completion_text: We’ve learned what we can for now, but we can’t afford to stop here. The darkness is spreading, and we need more information to understand how to break this curse. Time is slipping away. One of my wenches... she’s gone. Choked on her own blood and bile. The others may not be far behind. We need to press on, gather more answers before it’s too late for them—before it’s too late for all of us.

objectives.description: Kill 12 Death Skull in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Cursed Connections
quests.greeting: It was hard enough dealing with the death of one of my wenches, but things have taken a far darker turn. As they were preparing her body for burial, she came back—alive, or at least, not dead. But she wasn’t the same. She was twisted, wrong. Her eyes, lifeless but burning with something unnatural. She attacked anyone who came near, even tearing a chunk out of one of the priests. They had no choice but to sever her head and burn her to keep her from spreading whatever curse had claimed her. This... this is the nightmare we’re dealing with. We must continue looking into the origins of this curse and find a way to stop it. If we can’t reverse it, then we need to learn the most effective ways to end these horrors before they spread further.
quests.completion_text: The priest, who tried to help, is now infected. He’s become one of them, twisted beyond recognition. We had no choice but to put him down before he could do any more harm. This curse is something different from the one that has plagued those marked by the runes carved into their flesh. I can’t help but wonder—are they connected in some way? Regardless, your findings have given us a new lead, and that’s something we can work with.

objectives.description: Kill 7 Skeleton Axeman in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 7 Skeleton Guardman in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 7 Skeleton Spearman in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Dark Advisor
quests.greeting: The lead has brought us here, adventurer, but we must not act hastily. It’s better to proceed carefully and find solid evidence before drawing conclusions. The Lich was once the king’s most loyal court wizard, and from everything we’ve uncovered so far, it seems he may have had a much larger role in what is happening than we first suspected. If we can find proof of his involvement within the Forgotten Castle, we might finally understand the full scope of this curse. Your task is simple: search the castle, and bring back anything that proves the Lich’s hand in this darkness. Only then can we begin to make our next move.
quests.completion_text: The Lich’s involvement is undeniable—he was the king’s most trusted, and from the evidence you’ve gathered, it appears he played a much larger role in this curse than we ever imagined. Yet, there’s still a possibility that he, too, was merely a pawn, tricked into believing he held true power. We must dig deeper and uncover more, but we also need to focus on preparing for the battles ahead. Visit me soon, adventurer—I must inform the others of our findings, and we must plan our next move.

quests.title: Blessings Be
quests.greeting: The fact that you’re still in one piece tells me the god’s are looking out fer ya. Might be a good idea to show your appreciation and offer some blessings at the shrines.
quests.completion_text: I tell ya, that feeling of spiritual clarity after receiving a good ol' blessing is hard to beat!

quests.title: Protector's Wrath
quests.greeting: Would it not be a waste to squander the blessings of the gods within a tavern? I know of some demons who are well deserving of divine retribution. Hunt them down and bring me the proof.
quests.completion_text: You’ve returned safely. Seeing this, I know you dealt with those fiends for certain. Your skill is truly remarkable. I celebrate your victory and grant you a reward worthy of it.

objectives.description: Kill 10 Demon Dog in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Confronting The Darkness
quests.greeting: The number of monsters within the Forgotten Castle continues to grow. Many adventurers strive to cleanse that place, yet it seems impossible to drive away the darkness entirely... Still, we cannot abandon this fight. Their numbers must be thinned. Defeat them and show me proof of your deeds. It will not be easy, but I ask this of you.
quests.completion_text: Tonight we celebrate! Let’s drink to your health and fortunes!

objectives.description: Kill 8 Skeleton Axeman in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 8 Skeleton Crossbowman in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 8 Skeleton Spearman in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Cold-Blooded Conflict
quests.greeting: The skeleton army has been wreaking havoc up on that snowy peak. Can you get a handle on them before they become an even greater threat?
quests.completion_text: I feel much safer now that you’ve cleared out a bunch of their kind. Take a seat by the fire and take a well deserved rest.

objectives.description: Kill 10 Frost Skeleton Axeman in Ice Cavern
Kill 10 Frost Skeleton Maceman in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Collector Of Trinkets
quests.greeting: I owe the Collector a debt but I can’t just leave the tavern. Can you collect the items for me and I’ll make it worth your while.
quests.completion_text: I knew I could count on you. The Collector's debt is settled, and as promised, here's something for your trouble.

quests.title: Frozen Terror
quests.greeting: Demonic forces have made their abode deep within the heart of the frost mountain. To top it off they’ve captured a terrifying frost wyvern. Who knows that terrible plans they intend to use that beast for. We need to take them out before they can spring into action.
quests.completion_text: Bravo! You’ve conquered the Frost Mountain’s deadliest foes. Come, have a drink with me. I’ve prepared a brew that’s as legendary as your deeds.

objectives.description: Kill 3 Frost Demon in Ice Cavern
Kill 5 Frost Imp in Ice Cavern
Kill 1 Frost Wyvern in Ice Cavern

quests.title: The Demons Below
quests.greeting: More demons have appeared deep within the Forgotten Castle. Ugly things, worse than anything we've seen before. And we still don’t even know what’s causing the plague. Things aren't looking good. If this keeps up, something far worse could be waiting for us. Adventurer, please. Put an end to those demons from the Inferno.
quests.completion_text: I knew you’d pull it off. You’ve done a great job, truly. More than anything, I’m just glad you made it back in one piece. Come now, have a seat. Let me pour you a pint of the finest ale in all the realm. Once you've had a good swig, tell me your tale from the Inferno.

quests.title: Frostbitten Pursuit
quests.greeting: As always, I’m after something valuable, but this land is plagued with these beasts—Frost Wolves. I need you to thin them out, clear the path, so I can get what I’m after without being interrupted by these vile creatures.
quests.completion_text: Fantastic. You’ve done well. Now, go ahead and rest up; I’m sure you’ve earned it. Come see me soon when you’re ready to continue. We’re not done yet.

objectives.description: Kill 3 Frost Wolf in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Collector’s List
quests.greeting: I’ve got a rather long list of curiosities I’m chasing, but let’s start with these two. They’re not much on their own, but I assure you, they’ll help further my collection. As soon as you gather them, I’ll task you with the next item.
quests.completion_text: These are just the pieces I needed. There’s still much more to gather, but go ahead and thaw out. When you're ready, come back for the next task. We’re far from finished.

quests.title: Fortune’s Favor
quests.greeting: I received a request from the Fortune Teller, but of course she asked for an item I passed on to another collector not long ago. I have a few favors to ask of her myself, and I would rather not lose her goodwill over something so trivial. I will need to acquire it again. Would you help me? It should not be too difficult to find.
quests.completion_text: Good. I will see that these are delivered properly. The Fortune Teller and I sometimes seek things that may seem a little peculiar to others. But I do not concern myself with what people say. We know exactly what it is we must do.

quests.title: The Ordinary and the Extraordinary
quests.greeting: Objects found within dungeons may seem common, yet they are never truly ordinary. At times, the essence of the land or its creatures seeps into them, transforming them into something entirely different. Of course, most may be discarded, but if even the slightest possibility lies within... is that not worth the attempt?
quests.completion_text: The true worth of an object shines only in the hands of one who can recognize it. This one is no different. Thanks to you, I have obtained it, and you shall have your rightful reward. You have done well.

quests.title: Frost Mountain Ascent
quests.greeting: I’ve been hearing of a wonderous gadgetry up on the great peak out yonder. Might you do my bidding and have a look out there?
quests.completion_text: Such curiosities! I wonder who could have built such vast structures. We’ll need to prepare an expedition in the future!

objectives.description: Explore IceCave FourRoute in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Peculiar Collections
quests.greeting: Don’t be taken aback for what I’m about to ask. I need some very peculiar things and you’re the only one I can trust.
quests.completion_text: Quick quick! Don’t let anyone see you with those. Hand them over and off with you!

quests.title: Offerings to the Sea
quests.greeting: Long ago, the merfolk are said to have offered themselves as sacrifices to calm the fury of the sea after committing a great wrong. Most dismiss it as an old tale, but I do not. Did you know there were once far more merfolk than there are today? There must be a hidden truth behind it. I want you to find out whether a merfolk grave truly exists within the Blue Maelstrom.
quests.completion_text: My word! Bound in ropes and sunk beneath the waves, you say? Remarkable. This could be compelling evidence that something from the merfolk legend truly happened. Were they truly sacrifices, just as the stories claim? Or is there another truth we’ve yet to uncover? Fascinating. That place certainly deserves a closer investigation.

quests.title: Beast of Frost Mountain
quests.greeting: This time, the task will be a bit more difficult. The yetis of Frost Mountain resemble apes, but they are far larger. Despite their massive size, they are incredibly swift and cunning. If you can bring that creature down, I’ll be willing to consider a new offer.
quests.completion_text: Truly impressive. It's been some time since I've seen an adventurer of your skill. I hope you won't take offense. This wasn't meant as a test. But after watching so many missions end in bitter failure, I'm sure you can understand my caution. In any case, you've earned my trust now, and I intend to reward you accordingly.

quests.title: Legacy of the Mermaids
quests.greeting: It’s well known that merfolk lure people with their enchanting songs. But what fascinates me more is the merfolk themselves. Their shimmering, iridescent scales and the crystals known as mermaid’s tears. The tears in particular are said to form at the very moment their breath leaves them, like a final scream. What do you say, adventurer? If you can bring these to me, I promise the reward will not disappoint.
quests.completion_text: These scales have such a strange and mesmerizing hue. And this tear, this translucent droplet-shaped crystal, expands my view once more despite all the gems I’ve collected over the years. It is truly a breathtaking beauty.

quests.title: Chilled Vengeance
quests.greeting: Been getting reports of some terrible beasts up on the mountain harassing my kin. Can you do a favor and take them out?
quests.completion_text: That’s pretty impressive. Those beasts weren’t pushovers. Hope these items make up for your time.

objectives.description: Explore ShipGraveyard MermaidTomb in Ship Graveyard

quests.title: Keeping Warm
quests.greeting: Heard it’s getting pretty cold up in the peaks. Nothing warms the body like a few good ales and taking out skeletons.
quests.completion_text: Hope you didn’t get a hangover. Here’s a few coin to help you recover.

objectives.description: Kill 10 Mermaid Corpse in Ship Graveyard

quests.title: Mountain's Inhabitants
quests.greeting: I got another peculiar request. I need a few items that only come from the terrible creatures up on that frost mountain. Get them for me and I’ll be sure to make up for your time.
quests.completion_text: Hmm, some of these are a bit bloody, but no worries, I'll have them cleaned up in no time.

quests.title: Gold-Cloaked Secrets
quests.greeting: I’ve heard on good authority that some old relics are more than what they seem. If there’s one thing I can’t resist, it’s a good mystery.
quests.completion_text: Let’s see what secrets I can uncover with these artifacts. I’ll let you know if I discover anything. In the meantime, here have these items.

objectives.description: Kill 8 Ice Harpy in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Fable or Fact
quests.greeting: Those pieces you brought were just the tip of the iceberg. It looks like the rarer relics hold similar secrets. Can you check some of the more valuable chests for similar relics?
quests.completion_text: Hmm I’m starting to notice a pattern. I think a few more pieces and I’ll have unraveled their origin.

quests.title: Silent Observer
quests.greeting: I know this next list of items is a little strange, but trust me, I’m getting close to discovering the secret of the relics.
quests.completion_text: Ah ha! That bowl was the missing link! This is all very interesting. Hmmm... a land lost to the sea. I apologize. I’m getting ahead of myself.

objectives.description: Interact 3 Gold Chest in Forgotten Crypt
Interact 5 Ornate Chest Large in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: The Collector’s Desire
quests.greeting: Adventurer, there are many like me who seek rare and elusive relics. Such a pursuit is no mere pastime, but a noble path of inquiry. Ancient legends, hidden treasures, remnants of the past, traces of monsters... anything will do. Bring me what is truly rare, and you shall be handsomely rewarded.
quests.completion_text: Oh... this is truly of great worth. I cannot deny that not only your skill, but also your eye for rarity grows keener with each step. Since you have brought me such a treasure, I shall grant you something special in return. And should you uncover more marvels in your journey ahead, be sure to bring them to me.

quests.title: Wagers and Favors
quests.greeting: The Collector’s luck ran out when he tangled with the Goblin Merchant. Now, his debt has become my burden, thanks to an old favor I owe him. I need your help to settle it—one gemmed ring and one necklace. Find them, and I’ll ensure you're compensated.
quests.completion_text: Impressive! These gleaming gems will do the trick. The Collector will be satisfied, and you’ve more than earned your compensation.

quests.title: A Legacy of Pain
quests.greeting: Greetings. I’ve been occupied with a few matters lately—settling the debts of those who’ve passed and informing their kin of the burdens left behind. It’s a task that doesn’t get easier with time. But what’s more unsettling is the way these poor souls have been treated. Branded, tortured like animals, only to waste away in silence until death claims them. One of my patrons has provided me with a lead. They believe they know where their loved one was found. I think we should investigate.
quests.completion_text: The evidence you uncovered paints a grim picture of what’s happening. The ritualistic marks, the suffering... But if the rumors are true, and someone or something is devouring their souls, I wonder... Come back soon. I need to look into something.

objectives.description: Explore Ruins Cemetery 01 in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Whispers of the Devoured
quests.greeting: You’re back. Good. I’ve been mulling over something—rumors of creatures that devour souls. The wraiths are the first of many, I suspect. If we slay them, perhaps the souls trapped in this cycle will find rest. And if we’re lucky, those still living might snap out of whatever trance they’re in. It’s a long shot, but it’s a start.
quests.completion_text: The wraith is gone, but sadly, no change in the living. I’ll need to do some research and figure out what our next move should be. Come back soon; we’ll need to plan more precisely and carefully than when I’m balancing the books.

quests.title: Buried Secrets
quests.greeting: Rumors suggest that the bodies within may have been among the first to be subjected to the same ritualistic torment as those more recent poor souls. Search for any clues—check if their tongues were severed or if strange markings are carved into their flesh. We can’t be sure until we investigate. If there’s any connection, we need to understand it before this spreads further.
quests.completion_text: One of the bodies did indeed bear markings similar to those we’ve encountered before—though they seem slightly different. This suggests a deeper, darker evolution of whatever is at play. We’re not done yet, though. I’ll need more time to piece these findings together. Come back soon.

objectives.description: Explore Ruins Chapel in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Easing the Burden
quests.greeting: I can't get over these poor souls, their families left to shoulder the weight of debts they never signed up for. It’s a cruel irony—those who’ve passed, leaving behind not just sorrow but financial ruin. The living kin are trapped, burdened by the aftermath of their loved ones’ affairs. I want to help free them from this, but to do so, we need to gather the necessary funds. Bring me 50 silver coins, and we can start easing their suffering.
quests.completion_text: Good work. This is a solid start, but it won’t be enough to clear all the debts left behind by the dead. We’ll need more, but at least we’re on the right path. For now, this will help begin the process of easing their suffering.

quests.title: Misplaced Muffin
quests.greeting: Nice to see you again. The families are starting to feel the weight lift, and I’m hoping there’s something of real value hidden inside those Mimics. Whatever we find could go a long way in easing their suffering.
quests.completion_text: Good work. The families have asked me to express their gratitude. One even baked you a Chocolate Chip Muffin as a token of thanks. Unfortunately, I seem to have misplaced it... though I swear I didn’t eat it. In any case, the silver and other valuables you’ve brought will make a real difference.

quests.title: Ceremonial Cup
quests.greeting: I’ve heard whispers—dark rumors—of a chalice, one used in the first rituals. It’s said to lie hidden in the Forgotten Castle, a relic of blood and shadows. I don’t need to tell you that it’s no ordinary artifact. It’s something far darker. Something that could give us the answers we desperately seek, or drag us deeper into this abyss. I need you to find it before it’s too late. The darkness is spreading, and we need to understand what secrets it holds before they consume us all.
quests.completion_text: The chalice you’ve brought back is undeniably foul, a palpable darkness clinging to it like a stain. But is it the one we need? I’ll send it to someone more skilled in these matters to confirm our findings. In the meantime, I’ve been informed of other pressing issues that will require your attention sooner rather than later.

quests.title: Purging the Path
quests.greeting: There’s a definite darkness to the chalice you found. While it’s still being researched, I’ve been informed that there were many pieces used in the original ceremony, fragments we still don’t fully understand. My contact is still digging deeper, but it’s suggested that the answers to some of these missing pieces may lie within the King’s Treasure Room. However, we’ll need to clear out any undead protectors lingering there before we can get close to the truth. Once you’ve dealt with the threats inside, come see me. We may be closer than we think, but this task is far from over.
quests.completion_text: The information you gathered was helpful to my contact and is leading us deeper into the mystery. We’re starting to piece things together, though there’s still much left to uncover. The truth is closer now, but it’s going to take time to fully understand the significance of what we’re dealing with. Return soon—the next step of this journey is just ahead.

objectives.description: Kill 1 Skeleton Champion in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Throne of the Forsaken
quests.greeting: The Inferno holds many secrets, but there’s one we’re desperate to uncover. The fallen king’s throne lies deep within its fiery depths, and you’ve been chosen to find it. Your task is clear: locate the throne and examine it for any unusual markings, glyphs, or relics. Every detail could hold significance. The throne may contain clues about the ritual, or perhaps the king’s true fate. We need to understand what’s hidden within.
quests.completion_text: The throne has revealed more than we expected—its markings tell a story of power, loss, and untold secrets. But this is only the beginning. What we’ve uncovered is just a piece of the puzzle, and I fear the answers we seek lie deeper within the Inferno. You’ve seen enough to know there’s more to be found, though the path forward remains unclear. There’s a door that awaits, one that has been sealed for far too long. Once you’re ready, we’ll need to face whatever lies beyond it.

quests.title: Iron Tight
quests.greeting: Deep below The Forgotten Castle lies an iron door sealed shut. It is known to be heavily guarded... but the reason why is still unknown. I need you to go find out what that reason might be.
quests.completion_text: I didn’t think you had it in you... you really do know your way around down there. Don’t go too far, I will be needing your skills again soon.

objectives.description: Interact 1 Reinforced Dungeon Door in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Something Marvelous
quests.greeting: Rumors of a grand chest filled with blessed riches have echoed around these parts for years... but after hearing some tavern talk, I am convinced I know where it sits. If you think you have what it takes, I will guide you on your way to open it once and for all!
quests.completion_text: That chest held everything I imagined and more! If you find yourself a few more chests like that, you might become the richest adventurer in town!

objectives.description: Interact 1 Marvelous Chest in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: A Legendary Addition
quests.greeting: You seem to have proven your ability to explore the more dangerous parts of that castle... Now, I need you to find a Ceremonial Dagger! However, only the finest of quality will be accepted into my collection. The deeper you go, the easier it will be to acquire such a thing.
quests.completion_text: I knew you would find it, but I didn’t expect you to be so quick! I hope this reward is fair compensation for your tremendous effort.

quests.title: Gold Rush
quests.greeting: As we prepare for the battles ahead, remember, it's not just your weapons and armor that need upgrading. Your coffers must grow as well! Let's make some financial gains to ensure we're prepared for the unexpected.
quests.completion_text: Excellent plundering! With each haul from the chests, your riches grow evermore.

objectives.description: Interact 3 Gold Chest in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Behind The Stone
quests.greeting: I have heard stories of a stone door deep below The Forgotten Castle... It is said to hold unimaginable legendary treasures, so, how does a hunt sound?
quests.completion_text: You’ve truly found it! When I first sent you on this journey, I never believed the legends were real. Yet here you are, proving me wrong—and bringing a myth to life.

objectives.description: Interact 1 Double Stone Door in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Bangle Lord
quests.greeting: I have been searching for bangles... but not just any bangles. I need bangles of the highest quality, would you know where to find any? You might have some luck searching those piles of treasure in that haunted castle... but be careful, you won’t be the only one searching for these.
quests.completion_text: These are perfect! How did you manage to find bangles in this condition? You really have a knack for getting the good stuff.

quests.title: Superior Equipment
quests.greeting: What do you believe ensures safety in an adventure? Skill, of course, is essential. But when skill levels are equal, what makes the difference? Superior equipment. Unfortunately, while decent gear is easy to find here, truly exceptional equipment is rare. In truth, many such treasures lie buried deep within the Forgotten Castle, hidden among hoards of riches. You should seek them out.
quests.completion_text: I hope you found something of value. I trust in your skill, but I have seen far too many adventurers who relied solely on their abilities—only to never return. I wish to continue doing business with you, so always ensure you are well-prepared.

quests.title: What the Alchemist Seeks
quests.greeting: Do you remember the stone door you opened last time? Now that we know for certain that treasures lie beyond such doors, we must investigate the rumors of other sealed passages as well. Open them and see what lies beyond. And... if you come across any treasure that carries a strange aura, be sure to let me know.
quests.completion_text: Was there nothing unusual? I see... Actually, I’ve heard that an Alchemist has been searching for something lately. As you know, Alchemists will do anything in the name of their experiments—whether for good or ill, it hardly matters to them. This time, he’s looking for a particular item, and I find that concerning... If I find out what exactly he seeks, I will let you know.

objectives.description: Interact 1 Double Stone Door in Forgotten Crypt
Interact 1 Golden Door in Forgotten Crypt
Interact 1 Reinforced Dungeon Door in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: The Ominous Crown
quests.greeting: I’ve discovered what the Alchemist is searching for—a cursed crown. No matter what is done to it, it remains unscathed, and the gemstone at its center glows even in complete darkness. Can you find it before he does? I do not know what curse it carries, but this time, the Alchemist must not be allowed to obtain it. I have a bad feeling about this.
quests.completion_text: This seems to be the one. It’s a relief that you found it first. Please keep this matter a secret from the Alchemist. I know he has accomplished remarkable things and has helped many people, but I worry that one day, he may cross a line he cannot return from. I only hope that day never comes.

quests.title: Culling For Love
quests.greeting: The season of love has come... yet the air is still filled with death. Skeletons, goblins, kobolds... the plague is spreading to everything that moves. For now, ending those who carry it seems to be the only way to slow its spread. I sincerely ask for your help.
quests.completion_text: We may not be able to stop the spreading plague all at once, but if everyone lends their strength as you have, it will buy us time to restore the balance of love. Please, take this rose. It once bloomed in darkness, but through purification, it has regained its true fragrance. A living testament that, with love, anything can be restored.

quests.title: Leading The Charge
quests.greeting: Even the strongest creatures are not immune to this plague. Many adventurers avoid the riskiest encounters, but someone must face them. If you lead the way, I will make sure the risk is worth it.
quests.completion_text: I know it wasn’t easy, but your courage will pave the way forward. Sometimes, love spreads through the most unexpected paths.

quests.title: Plague Watch
quests.greeting: I have yet to measure the true extent of this rot. Search everywhere you can. We must continue to monitor the situation.
quests.completion_text: This is exactly what I needed to know. Our combined efforts are working. If we keep this up, love will surely prevail.

quests.title: The First Step of Love
quests.greeting: The Black Rose has become a symbol of resistance against this plague. Once steeped in darkness, it has now been fully purified, bearing a new kind of beauty and fragrance. Bring me one, and I will reward you for your effort.
quests.completion_text: It may not be a grand reward, but if you continue to help keep this plague at bay, I will find a way to offer you something better.

quests.title: Going All In
quests.greeting: You are clearly making a difference, Adventurer. As more people join you in purpose, we will be able to overcome this trial all the sooner. As a token of that journey, would you bring me three Black Roses?
quests.completion_text: I know it was no easy task, but I hope this reward brings you some small comfort. As long as we do not give up, we will surely see this through.

quests.title: Bringer of Love
quests.greeting: There is no defeat for the power of love. If you can gather ten Black Roses, that alone will stand as a great sign of encouragement in this arduous fight. It may take time, but I ask that you see it through to the very end.
quests.completion_text: You have taken the lead in restoring the balance of love through your efforts. You are truly a Bringer of Love. I hope this gift can repay you for all that you have done.

quests.title: Forbidden Craft
quests.greeting: My great-grandfather was a master craftsman, but his greatest work—enchanted daggers—came at a cost. He learned forbidden Dwarven techniques, but they led him down a dark path. Now, I must finish what he started. Bring me two rare weapons, and I’ll use them to forge something that will surpass all before it.
quests.completion_text: These weapons will work. With them, I can begin the real work, but there’s more to this story. My great-grandfather spoke of an ancient sword hidden in Frost Mountain—crafted by the Dwarves who taught him... Well need to investigate this soon, but let’s rest for now.

objectives.description: Interact 3 Stone Tomb in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Tales of Power
quests.greeting: Let me tell you more. My great-grandfather once ventured into Frost Mountain, drawn by tales of a sword of great power. It was said to be forged by the same Dwarves who taught him their craft. If this sword is real, it could be the key to completing his legacy—and mine. Find it, and I’ll finally understand what he couldn’t.
quests.completion_text: You’ve found it. This sword... it’s more than I expected. I can feel its power, but it’s not just a weapon—it’s tied to something darker... We”ll have to travel back to the swords resting place and unveil its tainted history. Maybe those forsaken frost spiders guarding it that have plagued my lineage for centuries will give us a clue.

objectives.description: Kill 5 Living Statue in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Growing Whispers
quests.greeting: These spiders aren’t just creatures—they’re part of the curse that has followed my family for generations. My great-grandfather fought them, and it nearly destroyed him. Clear the way—kill five of them—and I can study the sword in peace. We’re too close now.
quests.completion_text: They’re dead, but something isn’t right. I can feel the sword changing me, just like it did my great-grandfather...The whispers are growing louder. I’m not sure how much longer I can resist... But we can’t stop now. I’ll need more from you soon...

quests.title: Tombstone
quests.greeting: Stone tombs, and coffins... The Forgotten Castle has an abundance of them... I bet some of them have never even been opened, but you might have to fight to be the first. What do you say?
quests.completion_text: Your hands tell the story... so don’t bother telling it to me. Here, these might make it easier for you next time!

quests.title: The Statues Are Alive
quests.greeting: Some fool came into the Tavern last night speaking of “Living Statues” flying around the Ruins... I haven’t ever seen such a thing, but would you mind taking a look?
quests.completion_text: Wow... and here I was thinking how ridiculous that sounded. Those Ruins are getting more dangerous by the day.

objectives.description: Explore IceCave Pyramid in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Farm It or Buy It
quests.greeting: I am in urgent need of Gold Ingots... I don’t know how you are going to get them, but if you do I will make it worth your time!
quests.completion_text: You brought these a lot faster than I expected... I guess you were prepared. If you come back later I might be able to craft something special for you.

objectives.description: Kill 5 Ice Giant Spider in Ice Cavern

quests.title: In Search of the Dwarven Land
quests.greeting: I never imagined the dwarves’ ancient homeland would lie beneath the mountain range, connected to the Goblin Caves. There was a reason we could not find even the slightest trace, no matter how thoroughly we searched Frost Mountain. At last, we can investigate the proper place. Adventurer, please confirm the dwarves’ land.
