quests.completion_text: Molten lava cascading like a waterfall... Their forges must be boiling at unimaginable heat. Now I see why dwarven craftsmanship advanced so far. No matter the effort, there are limits to how hot a fire can burn. But the land they lived in already provided perfect conditions.

objectives.description: Explore Firedeep MagmaFalls in Goblin Cave

quests.title: The Potential of Obsidian
quests.greeting: Obsidian is so rare that it is usually traded only as expensive jewelry. But weapons forged from obsidian are said to be sharper than those made from any other material. If you can bring me a small amount of obsidian, I will try forging one myself.
quests.completion_text: Well done. This is the first time I have seen an obsidian ore of this size. The dwarves must have refined their craft by working with many different minerals since long ago. For a craftsman like me, this is like a dream come true.

prerequisite.title: In Search of the Dwarven Land

quests.title: What the Dwarves Made
quests.greeting: My great-grandfather even learned his craft from the dwarves, yet now we cannot communicate with them at all... If that is the case, conflict seems inevitable. If I cannot ask them directly, then I would like to examine the tools they have made instead. Their condition does not matter, so please bring me as many as you can.
quests.completion_text: Even though most of it has melted beyond recognition the condition of what remains intact is astonishing. This durability and smoothness... the dwarves are not called master craftsmen without reason. Yet I sense no unusual magic here. Then where exactly was the dagger I inherited made...

objectives.description: Kill 10 Dwarf Handcannoneer in Goblin Cave
Kill 10 Dwarf Mauler in Goblin Cave

quests.title: Culling the Enemy
quests.greeting: Good timing. Unfortunately, we’ll have to put our side mission on hold. A surge in monsters is wreaking havoc, and I’m almost certain it’s tied to what we were investigating. It feels like something doesn’t want us getting any closer. Even my trade routes are overrun by these beasts, so the sooner you help me clear them out, the sooner we can get back on track.
quests.completion_text: Well done, adventurer. With those beasts cleared out, my trade routes are safe again, and we can finally get back on track. I have a feeling we’re closer to uncovering the truth than ever before. Hopefully, nothing else slows us down.

quests.title: Gathering Progress
quests.greeting: Remember that list I mentioned earlier with the glowing bug parts? There are a few more items we need to gather: some rotten fluids, high quality weapons, and ten armor scraps. It’s not a pleasant task, but I know you can handle it.
quests.completion_text: Excellent work. While my wife’s health remains unchanged, the presence of family has lifted my spirits. These items should help us make progress, and I’m grateful for your dedication.

objectives.description: Interact 25 Simple Chest Small in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Piercing Heat
quests.greeting: I have been racking my brain lately, trying to forge a weapon with greater power. Yet with the materials I possess, I cannot bring my idea to life. There are a few things I require, rare and not easily found. Will you help me?
quests.completion_text: Thank you. If this turns out as I envision, it will be a weapon unlike any other. When that time comes, I shall craft one for you.

objectives.description: Interact 5 Gold Chest in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: A Weapon That Pierces All
quests.greeting: Adventurer, bring me a few weapons that are not easily found. My goal is to forge a blade that can pierce through anything. Though I am still far from completing such a work, I refuse to give up and continue my attempts. This time I intend to test materials that are dangerous to handle. I must study them closely and discover how they might be used.
quests.completion_text: These weapons look like the work of dwarves. They’re the kind of craftsmen who can forge fine weapons without ever needing to rely on magic. But I suppose that wasn’t enough for them. To go even further, they must’ve reached for forbidden techniques. That hunger to make something better... I think I understand it now.

objectives.description: Kill 9 Ruins Golem in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 20 Living Armor in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: The Vile Ones
quests.greeting: I’ve heard rumors that new demons have begun to appear in the Inferno. They’re stronger, and they hunt adventurers with ruthless precision. It would be ideal to drive them back into the darkness before they fully settle in... but at the very least, we can’t just let them grow comfortable. Take them down. I believe if anyone can do it, it’s you.
quests.completion_text: Thanks to you, things should quiet down for a while. I appreciate it. Those creatures... they’re born of malice itself. No matter how many you cut down, they just keep coming, like vermin. Until we deal with the source, this fight won’t truly be over.

quests.title: Out of the Dark
quests.greeting: The masters of the dungeon have grown more cunning. Those beasts have slithered into deeper shadows than ever before. Luckily, if you bring the right materials to the alchemist, he says he can craft something to draw them out. I trust his skill well enough, but I prefer certainty over guesswork. Take what he gives you, see if it truly summons those monsters, and if it does, make sure they don't walk away.
quests.completion_text: By the gods, you mean they actually appeared? I can't tell if that's a blessing or a curse. Still, the fact that you brought them down is news worth hearing. Thank you for risking yourself to uncover the truth.

objectives.description: Kill 1 Ghost King in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 1 Skeleton Warlord in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Teachings of Arms
quests.greeting: You cannot hope to forge a fine weapon by relying on luck. It takes constant practice, much experience, and even failure to shape something greater. Studying weapons already completed is of great value as well. If you bring me a few good ones, I shall exchange them for a better piece of my own making.
quests.completion_text: Thank you for your efforts. These are quite serviceable weapons. If I examine them carefully, I am sure I will learn something from them. Now, as promised, I will give you the weapon I forged. May it serve you well.

quests.title: Refinement of Craft
quests.greeting: Forging ordinary weapons is not particularly difficult. But producing an exceptional weapon is an entirely different matter. The strength and balance a fine weapon must possess can never be fully learned by study alone. So if you bring me weapons that are a step above the last batch, I will use them as the basis to craft an even finer piece.
quests.completion_text: Well done. All of this will serve as the foundation for me to make better weapons. Here, I present a new piece I recently completed. May it be of service to you, adventurer.

quests.title: The Craftsman’s Fruit
quests.greeting: Adventurer, the time has come to take on a new tier. Drawing on the experience I have amassed, I intend to forge a weapon surpassing anything I have made so far. To complete it properly I require your aid. If you would procure for me several rare weapons not easily obtained, I shall present to you the fruit of my labour.
quests.completion_text: Well done. Thanks to you I have gained much insight and was able to complete this weapon. For now, this is the best my craft can achieve, but I will continue to strive ceaselessly to create something more perfect. For I know that effort will never betray me.

quests.title: The Basics
quests.greeting: People think it’s the beasts that get you in this land, but it’s not. It’s the cold. The hunger. It gets into your skin, your bones, and slowly, you’re dead before you even know it. I’ve seen too many inexperienced fools wander into the wilderness, too proud to listen to warnings, and they end up like the others. No one dies in their sleep out here unless they’re already dead. If you’re not careful, hunger and frost will do their work long before the claws of any creature ever get the chance. So it’s important to always cover your basics before any adventure.
quests.completion_text: Those supplies you gathered will keep us from being another casualty of the cold. I know this lesson all too well. There was a time, not long ago, when I lost some of my closest companions to the freezing winter. I wanted to bury them, to give them the peace they deserved, but the earth was locked in ice, cold as death itself. When I finally returned to bury them properly, their bodies had vanished.

quests.title: Invasive Species
quests.greeting: A lot of people are helping in the search for the Leathersmith's lost daughter, but not all of them are as capable as you. There’s plenty of inexperienced souls stumbling into the wilderness, thinking they can handle it. It’s up to us to clear the path and make it safer for those who don't have the skills. We don’t want them getting in the way or becoming another burden.
quests.completion_text: Nice job. The path is clearer now, and those less prepared have a better shot at staying alive. It won’t be easy, but you’ve given them a damn good chance. I appreciate the help—stay sharp; we’ve still got a long way to go.

objectives.description: Kill 5 Dire Wolf in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Fortune's Guidance
quests.greeting: Glad to see you made it back in one piece. The search for the Leathersmith’s daughter has turned up nothing, but I’ve been digging around... got desperate enough to visit that damn fortune teller. She gave me a place to check—let's see if there's any truth to her cryptic ramblings.
quests.completion_text: Well, I’ll be damned. She was right... I don’t know how, but it seems we’re on the right path. It’s a sliver of hope, but it’s enough for now. And between you and me, that fortune teller lady freaks me out—she eats bloody eyeballs and all sorts of strange things.

objectives.description: Explore Ruins Square 01 in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Foulburster
quests.greeting: It seems the insects of the Inferno have evolved into something even more vile. The demon flies are said to explode in front of their chosen target, dealing harm in the blast. Truly revolting creatures. We must deal with these filthy pests before they spread any further.
quests.completion_text: Well done. This should keep things under control for a while. But since we still don't know the source of those creatures, all we can do is clear them out from time to time. I’ll be counting on you again when the time comes.

quests.title: The Use of a Forgotten Castle
quests.greeting: The cursed castle is full of terrible things, but it sits in a forest long left untouched where good timber can still be found. Sometimes I go there to cut wood and salvage usable pieces from broken remains. If you go to the castle and find good timber, could you bring some back for me?
quests.completion_text: You found some good usable pieces. Wood is heavy, so it is hard for me to carry much on my own. Thanks to you, my work will be much easier. Thank you.

quests.title: Absolutely Batty
quests.greeting: Demon bats are the bane of my existence. Every blue moon one of those bastards make it out of their god forsaken hole and wreck havoc on plot. Do me a favor and help me locate where they come from.
quests.completion_text: Ew, that place sounds just as disgusting as I’d imagine. I’d suggest you take a bath to get some of that stench off you.

prerequisite.title: The Use of a Forgotten Castle

quests.title: Haunting Presence
quests.greeting: I used to have a keen sense to detect demonic auras in my youth. Alas, these days that skill has gone to waste. I am curious if you can replicate my odd abilities.
quests.completion_text: Your skills are impressive as always. Unfortunately your report seems to indicate that darkness has overtaken the castle.

quests.title: Amidst Peril
quests.greeting: That forsaken castle has become the final resting ground for too many overconfident adventurers. I’m not saying you’re the same as the rest but I’d be surprised if you could survive more than once.
quests.completion_text: I was a fool for ever doubting your skills. Here, take these items as a token of my apology.

quests.title: Infernal Champions
quests.greeting: The demonic aura coming from the depths of the castle are so powerful that even my waning abilities can sense them. We need a hero to cleanse the air.
quests.completion_text: By the gods! You’ve done it. I haven’t felt this calm in years. Unfortunately, I’m not sure how long this will last.

objectives.description: Kill 3 Demon Bat in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 2 Demon Berserker in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 2 Centaur Demon in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 5 Demon Dog in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Ember's Amidst Frost
quests.greeting: Nothing better to test your fire making skills in the most inhospitable environment known to man. Get to it! Practice makes perfect.
quests.completion_text: Ah, nothing more comforting than a crackling campfire amidst the chill of the frost.

objectives.description: Use 8 Campfire Kit in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Frostbound Carnage
quests.greeting: The giant folk have been making trouble on the peaks. Clear the way for other adventurers and search parties by showing them who’s boss.
quests.completion_text: Impressive! Those giants are renown for their strength and you made it look easy!

objectives.description: Kill 9 Frost Giant Berserker in Ice Cavern
Kill 9 Frost Giant Shielder in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Frostborn Beasts
quests.greeting: Something has gotten into the beasts on the frozen peaks. They have been exhibiting more aggression than before. It’s time to put an end to their menace.
quests.completion_text: You've done good work here, but always remember—the mountain never rests.

objectives.description: Kill 9 Frost Wolf in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Frozen Enigmas
quests.greeting: I’ve heard that the depths of the Frost Mountain hold a dangerous secret. Can you explore it and let me know what you find?
quests.completion_text: A frost wyvern?! My dear, what could have compelled the demons to capture such a terrifying beast?

objectives.description: Explore IceAbyss WyvernLair in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Arctic Invaders
quests.greeting: It’s time to make those ghastly beasts pay for the chaos they’ve unleashed on the mountains.
quests.completion_text: A fine job in thinning out the forces of evil.

objectives.description: Kill 2 Frost Demon in Ice Cavern
Kill 3 Frost Imp in Ice Cavern
Kill 3 Frozen Ghost in Ice Cavern
Kill 5 Ice Harpy in Ice Cavern

quests.title: Collect and Deliver
quests.greeting: I’ve heard that the frost demons have enlisted even more legendary creatures to do their biddings. Bring me proof of their existence.
quests.completion_text: Good job. I know that taking out those beasts were no easy task. I only hope we put a dent in the plans of the frost demons.

quests.title: A Dire Request
quests.greeting: Please investigate the bridges of the Forgotten Castle and the site where the ritual, tainted by darkness, was once performed. I've heard rumors that if one lingers there for too long, the screams of someone unseen can be heard. I need to know whether this is truth or mere superstition.
quests.completion_text: You truly heard nothing? Truly...? That can't be... Another lead, ending in nothing... Sometimes, it feels suffocating, unbearable. When I think of her, suffering even at this very moment... Haa... Haa... No, this won’t do. I need to rest. Please, leave me be for now.

quests.title: Into the Darkness
quests.greeting: There is something I need to find in the Forgotten Castle. But first, the path must be cleared. Beasts and vermin tainted by darkness block the way, and my strength alone is not enough to handle them... Could you eliminate these creatures for me?
quests.completion_text: Thank you. Traveling through the area has become much easier—at least for now. I hope to find what I’m looking for before those creatures swarm back again... Ah, it’s a book. According to the Alchemist, these books could aid his research. Wish me luck.

objectives.description: Kill 15 Dire Wolf in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 15 Giant Bat in Forgotten Crypt
Kill 1 Giant Spider in Forgotten Crypt

quests.title: Ancient Records
quests.greeting: I searched through every bookshelf in the Ruins, but with my dull senses, I couldn’t find a single thing. This isn’t good... I was promised something in exchange for retrieving those books for the Alchemist, something I must obtain. Could you search for the books in my stead? Please, I’m counting on you.
quests.completion_text: Thank you so much. I won’t forget your help. Now, I just need to bring this to the Alchemist, and I’ll receive a new potion. The effects? ...I’ll tell you about them later.
